title: Our Qualifications
intro: Explore our comprehensive range of professionally recognised qualifications across Business, Management, and Health & Social Care.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 7 Diploma in Strategic Management and Leadership
qualifications.description: This qualification is designed for managers and leaders who have the authority and inspiration to translate organisational strategy into effective operational performance.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 6 Diploma in Business Management
qualifications.description: Develop advanced business management skills and prepare for senior management roles or further study at postgraduate level.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 5 Extended Diploma in Business Management
qualifications.description: Build a strong foundation in business management principles and practices for mid-level management careers.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 5 Diploma in Health and Social Care Management
qualifications.description: Gain specialist knowledge in health and social care management to lead teams and services effectively.

qualifications.title: QUALIFI Level 3 Diploma in Health and Social Care
qualifications.description: An entry-level qualification providing foundational knowledge in health and social care practice.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 4 Diploma in Business Management
qualifications.description: Start your journey in business management with this comprehensive Level 4 qualification.

qualifications.title: QUALIFI Level 7 Diploma in Strategic Management and Leadership
qualifications.description: An advanced qualification for senior professionals looking to enhance their strategic leadership capabilities.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 7 Diploma in Healthcare Management
qualifications.description: A specialist qualification for healthcare professionals aspiring to senior management positions.

meta.title: Qualifications – Prime College
meta.description: Browse our professional qualifications in Business, Management, and Health & Social Care.
